mapper.sql: id, data_info_id, restored_data_info_id, target_id, target_type, target_category, experiment_id, experiment_name, project_id, project_name, data_name, data_type, device_id, device_info, sample_frequency, work_status, is_simulation, source_path, backup_file_path, delete_by, delete_time, restore_by, restore_time, is_restored, ext_attr, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.insert: insert into SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.MD_BACKUP_DATA ( data_info_id, restored_data_info_id, target_id, target_type, target_category, experiment_id, experiment_name, project_id, project_name, data_name, data_type, device_id, device_info, sample_frequency, work_status, is_simulation, source_path, backup_file_path, delete_by, delete_time, restore_by, restore_time, is_restored, ext_attr, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time ) values ( #{dataInfoId}, #{restoredDataInfoId}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{targetCategory}, #{experimentId}, #{experimentName}, #{projectId}, #{projectName}, #{dataName}, #{dataType}, #{deviceId}, #{deviceInfo}, #{sampleFrequency}, #{workStatus}, #{isSimulation}, #{sourcePath}, #{backupFilePath}, #{deleteBy}, #{deleteTime}, #{restoreBy}, #{restoreTime}, #{isRestored}, #{extAttr}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.select:
select
from SYSTEM_COLLABORATION_TEST.MD_BACKUP_DATA where DATA_INFO_ID = #{dataInfoId} AND IS_RESTORED = 0
